SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-30-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-30-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE ON CROSS-CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HOWELL, SYDNEY RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT TAYLOR, RICHARD $4,992.54 PRINCIPAL, $62.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,054.54 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, RICHARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HOWELL, SYDNEY PLAINTIFF IS TO IMMEDIATELY REMOVE THE MECHANIC'S LIEN, DOCUMENT #2014J825393, WHICH PLAINTIFF RECORDED JANUARY 15, 2014 AGAINST DEFENDANT'S RESIDENCE, 77-A CAREMLITA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

COPYING FEES (4 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT HOWELL, SYDNEY
